name: Pro-Am Golf Club
about: Pro-Am Golf Club is an indoor golf entertainment venue located in Niles, Illinois, managed by WJ Golf. The facility features UDR simulators with 99.85% accuracy, offering 200+ world-class golf courses alongside arcade games and a full-service bar and kitchen. With 6 open and 2 private bays, the space is designed for both individual practice and group events, providing a comprehensive golf experience with a focus on technology and social entertainment. The venue operates on a seasonal schedule with extended hours during the fall to spring period, making it accessible for various activities from casual play to corporate gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: 99.85% accurate UDR simulators with dual-camera swing analysis
200+ world-class golf courses for diverse playing experiences
Full-service bar and kitchen with 20+ culinary delights
Option for private and corporate events in a 5000sqft facility
PGA Pro coaching available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen with 20+ culinary delights available on-site.
Full-service bar with refreshing beverages available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Precision-perfected simulators with 99.85% accuracy and dual-camera swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides golf equipment, but players are welcome to bring their own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed. The venue offers a full-service bar and kitchen with 20+ culinary delights and refreshing beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on simulator availability and pace of play, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is Pro-Am Golf Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and offers arcade games suitable for all ages and skill levels.
